drive_runtime._comment: Preferred production mode: configure one stable Drive root/folder. Workbooks and bank uploads are discovered inside it; file IDs are optional overrides.

evidence_rules._comment: Confirmed rules from the Corte Santo operating procedure. Evidence mismatches above tolerance require review.

ingresos_layout._comment: Confirmed SANTO monthly Ingresos template mapping. Yellow = loaded from corte; blue = bank validated.

vision_extraction._comment: Reads corte photos (tira, bancarias, AMEX, detalle de efectivo). The API key is read from the env var named below, never stored here. Low confidence or missing key -> requires_review. Evidence totals are still validated against the Corte Excel with zero tolerance.

bank_keywords._comment: Keyword rules to classify Banorte statement rows. 'REST SANTO' => Banorte settlement; SPEI from AMERICAN EXPRESS => amex; UBR PAGOS/UBER => uber; domiciliacion/Spotify => additional expense; configured ignore_deposit keywords are traced but excluded from operational deposits.

excel_layout._comment: Optional. Overrides the default corte Excel layout used by Option B extraction. If omitted, the shipped default (Cierre Ter/Pla + Cierre Sistema anchors, Consumo/Propina rows) is used. Any column header not present in column_label_map becomes a requires_review warning.
